bug_report: CalcServer.handleEval computes the cache key on the unsanitized request body, letting attacker-controlled keys collide with legit ones.
root_cause: CalcServer.handleEval omits the documented guard for the failure path; the analogous fix in earlier resolutions for api components applies here.
fix_diff:
--- a/corpus/target/src/main/java/com/example/calc/CalcServer.java
+++ b/corpus/target/src/main/java/com/example/calc/CalcServer.java
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 // context
-// handleEval missing guard
+// handleEval now guarded against numberformatexception
